headlines.title: Paramount–Warner Bros. merger could make HBO Max a 'staple' — even rivaling Netflix
headlines.summary: Investors are still waiting for the Paramount (PSKY)–Warner Bros. (WBD) merger to finalize. Morgan Stanley head of media & entertainment and cable & telecom equity research, Sean Diffley, chats with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi about AI's impact on the creative process, his outlook for streaming, and more.

headlines.title: Netflix Weighs Live TV Push
headlines.summary: The streamer is exploring new formats as viewer engagement shows signs of slipping.

description: Netflix, Inc. provides entertainment services worldwide. The company offers television (TV) series, documentaries, feature films, games, and live programming across various genres and languages. It also provides members the ability to receive streaming content through a host of internet-connected devices, including TVs, digital video players, TV set-top boxes, and mobile devices. Netflix, Inc. was incorporated in 1997 and is headquartered in Los Gatos, California.
